narrative:
Newark 7-B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,339 registered voters, with 65.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
